ocr_findings.description: The WBS diagram (tree structure showing 新営業店システム開発プロジェクト decomposed into 要件定義, システム設計, プログラミング, 結合テスト, and further into テスト計画, テスト実施, 品質基準定義, テスト計画書作成) is replaced by an image placeholder. The diagram node labels are not extracted into OCR text, but the surrounding explanation adequately describes the diagram.
The ruby/furigana annotation 'ダブリュビーエス' above WBS acronym is captured as a standalone line in OCR, which is correct and acceptable rendering.

reviewer_notes: Content page on プロジェクトスコープマネジメント and WBS (Work Breakdown Structure). Section header, definition paragraphs, and WBS explanation text are faithfully reproduced. The WBS tree diagram is an image placeholder; its node labels are not in OCR text but this is a known limitation with diagram figures. Body text quality is high.
